---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a component, option, or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

> ⚠️ Heads up: Pulsar is early stage and a work in progress. The roadmap and
> APIs are still in flux, so suggestions are welcome but timelines are not
> guaranteed.

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the use case or pain point, not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Pulsar to do. If it's a new component or a new option on an
existing component, sketch the API you'd expect:

```elixir
<.component some_new_attr="..." />
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, or how you work around this today.

## Additional context

Links, references to similar libraries, accessibility considerations, etc.
